title: Battle of Gormen

|date=Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]<ref name="Dates">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' establishes that [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]] was part of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Military/Legends|forces]] participating in the Battle of Gormen. {{DB|character|majorbrenderlin|Derlin, Major Bren}} places Derlin's promotion to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of major after the [[Battle of Nentan]], which must have taken place in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] per the reasoning [[Template:Rieekan timeline|here]]. Furthermore, ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the reorganization of the Rebel Alliance into the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Therefore, the Battle of Gormen must have occurred at some point between 0 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] and 4 ABY.</ref>

{{Quote|We had the Battle of Gormen won, until the AT-ATs arrived.|Major Bren Derlin|<ref name="NEGVV" />}}
The '''Battle of Gormen''' occurred during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the engagement, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Military/Legends|forces]], including the [[Field Commander/Legends|field commander]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]], were initially victorious. That changed when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] deployed its [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], which decimated the Rebel positions and caused those [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel soldiers]] not fleeing in panic to surrender. At some later point, Derlin gave an account of the battle.

==The battle==
{{Quote|They came out of the fog and ripped apart the front lines. The locals ran in terror, but the experienced soldiers surrendered. We knew that you can't outrun an AT-AT.|Major Bren Derlin|<ref name="NEGVV" />}}
[[File:ATATattack-EGTW.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Galactic Empire's All Terrain Armored Transport walkers (pictured in combat against Rebel Alliance soldiers) turned the tide of the Battle of Gormen against the Alliance.]]
The Battle of Gormen was a confrontation of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="NEGVV" /> It occurred at some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]<ref name="Dates" /> and shared its name with the [[Gormen system/Legends|Gormen system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Nuiri sector/Legends|Nuiri sector]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The Battle of Gormen took place in foggy conditions and involved [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel soldiers]]—both experienced offworld combatants and local fighters—fighting on front lines against Imperial opposition, with [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]] serving as a Rebel [[Field Commander/Legends|field commander]].<ref name="NEGVV" />

The [[Alliance Military/Legends|Rebel forces]] initially gained the upper hand in the engagement, but a turning point came when the Empire deployed the towering [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]]. Approaching the Rebel positions through fog, the walkers eventually emerged from the cover of the mist and proceeded to annihilate the enemy's forces. Although the Alliance's frightened local combatants fled the onslaught, those of its [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] who had previous experience against the walkers believed the machines could not be outrun and therefore chose to surrender.<ref name="NEGVV" />

==Aftermath==
Derlin survived the Battle of Gormen<ref name="NEGVV" />—ultimately going on to serve the Alliance's successor states, the [[Alliance of Free Planets]]<ref name="ForgottenWar">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}</ref> and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="MovieTrilogySourcebook">''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>—and at one point narrated the Rebels' plight during the engagement.<ref name="NEGVV" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Gormen was mentioned in the [[2003]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' by [[W. Haden Blackman]].<ref name="NEGVV" />
